form.formComment: Finished third last start (30.78) over 520m at this track. Gets the rails draw this time. Has to do a bit more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Turned head at approximately the 100m mark.

form.formComment: Hit the frame again last time when third (30.52) at Rockhampton, making it four minor placings in a row. Drawn close to the inside. Has to do a bit more.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a sensational early split but overwhelmed at the finish when a narrow fourth (34.90) over 600m at this track. Has claims on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a sensational early split but overwhelmed at the finish when a narrow fourth (34.90) over 600m at this track. Has claims on best form.

form.formComment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when third (30.75) over 520m at this track. Drawn awkwardly. Has ability and should run well.

formComments.comment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when third (30.75) over 520m at this track. Drawn awkwardly. Has ability and should run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out and clipped heels rounding the turn into the home straight.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (36.51) when second at Casino in a Grade 5. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from two starts. Leading player.

formComments.comment: Hit the frame latest (36.51) when second at Casino in a Grade 5. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from two starts. Leading player.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh in a Restricted WIN on April 12 over 600m at this track behind Pilton View, beaten 7 lengths (35.43). Prefer in something easier.

form.formComment: Placed only run here over this trip. Latest effort finished 2nd over 520m at this track beaten 0.8 lengths (30.10) behind Zipping Mehary in a Restricted WIN on April 16. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.
